title: No Darkness
body:
NO DARKNESS is a lightweight, vanilla-style FullBright resource pack that completely removes darkness from Minecraft while keeping the game’s original look and feel. It makes caves, nights, and low-light areas fully visible without OptiFine, Iris, or external shader packs.

Designed for players who want clear visibility without texture changes, NO DARKNESS delivers a clean and modern FullBright experience using Minecraft’s own rendering system.

✨ What NO DARKNESS Does

🌙 Removes night-time darkness

🕳️ Makes caves fully visible

🧱 Preserves 100% vanilla textures

🎮 No shaders menu required

⚡ Zero performance impact

🧼 Clean and minimal design

Enable it instantly, disable it anytime — no permanent changes.

🔥 Key Features

✔ True FullBright (not just brightened textures)
✔ Pure vanilla visuals
✔ No OptiFine / Iris required
✔ Works in singleplayer & most servers
✔ Extremely lightweight
✔ Instant toggle via resource packs

🧪 How It Works (Technical Overview)

Minecraft uses a lightmap to calculate world brightness.
NO DARK overrides the vanilla lightmap shader and forces full brightness values.

No block or texture replacements

No gameplay mechanics modified

No X-ray or transparency tricks

This approach ensures:

Maximum compatibility

Minimal risk of visual bugs

Clean behavior across updates

⚔️ PvP & Server Compatibility

✅ Works on most multiplayer servers

⚠️ Some competitive servers may restrict core shader overrides

❌ Does NOT reveal hidden blocks or entities

NO DARKNESS only removes darkness — nothing more.

🎮 Ideal For

Survival & Hardcore worlds

Cave exploration

PvP modes (BedWars, SkyWars, Duels)

Builders working at night

Low-end PCs (no FPS loss)

📦 Installation

Download NO DARKNESS

Place the ZIP file into:

.minecraft/resourcepacks


Enable it in Options → Resource Packs

Enjoy full visibility 🌟

🧩 Compatibility

✔ Minecraft 1.21.4

✔ Java Edition (1.17+)

❌ Not compatible with legacy versions

⚠️ Shader packs will override this pack

🏷️ Why Choose NO DARK?

Most FullBright packs rely on:

heavy texture edits

OptiFine emissive hacks

outdated tricks

NO DARKNESS uses a modern, vanilla-compatible lightmap override, keeping Minecraft natural and clean — just without darkness.

📸 Screenshots

Before: Dark, hard-to-see environments
After: Clear, bright worlds with natural colors

📜 Disclaimer

Server rules vary.
Use this pack responsibly and follow server guidelines.

❤️ Credits

Created by Arku Playz
If you enjoy NO DARKNESS, consider leaving a review or supporting the project.
